mapper.select: SELECT s.id AS submissionId, r.mode AS gameMode, t.name AS themeName, f.name AS frameworkName, s.execution_time AS executionTime, s.submitted_at AS submittedAt FROM submission s INNER JOIN room r ON s.room_id = r.id INNER JOIN theme t ON r.theme_id = t.id INNER JOIN problem_framework pf ON s.problem_framework_id = pf.id LEFT JOIN framework f ON f.id = COALESCE(pf.frontend_id, pf.backend_id) WHERE s.user_id = #{userId} AND s.status = 'SUCCESS' AND s.is_deleted = 'F' ORDER BY s.submitted_at DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM submission s WHERE s.user_id = #{userId} AND s.status = 'SUCCESS' AND s.is_deleted = 'F'
